sources.files_directories_inspected: Full HF dataset (93142 rows), repo structure (devGPT/, scrape/, opro/, gen_prompts/, analytics/)
sources.machine_readable_status: Yes - Parquet via HF datasets, JSON files in repo
sources.expected_prompt_fields: prompts (list of strings per row), file_contents, repo_name, file_name
sources.why_not_100_percent: Full semantic analysis of 282,640 prompt strings would exceed practical compute/time. Stratified sampling by length (short/medium/long, n=100 each) was used. 37.3% of prompts classified as 'other' (non-coding-agent tasks like translation, general Q&A, data labeling), making full analysis low-value for coding-agent focus.

sources.license_or_usage_note: No explicit license in repo. Research-use only per NAIST-SE terms.
sources.files_directories_inspected: 10 snapshot directories (20230727-20231012), 54 JSON files, ChatGPT_Link_Sharing.csv per snapshot
sources.machine_readable_status: Yes - JSON with nested ChatgptSharing array
sources.expected_prompt_fields: ChatgptSharing[].Conversations[].Prompt, surrounding metadata (source_type, model, status, title, repo)
sources.why_not_100_percent: 153,492 conversations across 54 JSON files. Full conversation-level analysis would require parsing all nested turns. Used stratified sampling across source types (code_file, issue, hacker_news, commit, pull_request, discussion) proportional to size. Median prompt length is only 13 tokens, meaning many are conversation follow-ups rather than standalone prompts.

sources.source_name: Vibe Coding with Cursor: A Complete Guide
sources.expected_prompt_fields: Phase-specific prompt templates (Planning, Architecture, Validation, Implementation, Testing, Documentation), Best Practices, Examples

sources.files_directories_inspected: 22 template YAML files from diverse domains under promptsource/templates/
sources.expected_prompt_fields: jinja (prompt template), answer_choices, metadata, dataset reference
sources.total_records_found: Hundreds of template YAML files across 200+ domains; 22 analyzed
sources.total_prompt_like_items_found: 22 template files (each containing multiple template variants)
sources.why_not_100_percent: PromptSource has 200+ domain directories each with multiple template YAML files. Full analysis is impractical and low-value for coding-agent focus since templates are NLP-task-specific (classification, QA, summarization) rather than coding-agent prompts. Structural patterns extracted from representative sample.

sources.license_or_usage_note: No explicit license in repo. Research/reference use only.
sources.files_directories_inspected: 27 system-prompt*.md, 16 skill-*.md, 35+ tool-description*.md, 10+ agent-prompt*.md, 10+ system-reminder*.md, 6 data-*.md files
sources.expected_prompt_fields: System prompt rules, agent instructions, tool descriptions, reminder messages, skill definitions
sources.why_not_100_percent: 519 files total. Many are highly specific (tool parameters, API references, streaming docs, etc.) with low relevance to IntentLayer compiler design. Focused on files with software engineering task structure, verification, safety, conciseness rules, and sub-agent patterns.

coverage_strategy.method: Full indexing/counting for all sources + stratified sampling for semantic analysis where full analysis impractical
